comingSoon.subtitle: One platform to explore your campus, get around, eat well, shop smart, and stay connected — built for students, in Bangla and English.

waitlist.title: Join the waitlist
waitlist.subtitle: Be the first to know when we launch.
waitlist.success: Thanks! You're on the list — we'll be in touch.
waitlist.invalid: Please enter a valid email address.

map.title: Campus & Places
map.desc: Explore your campus map, discover renowned spots, and find nearby shops, food and restaurants.

transport.title: Smart Transport
transport.desc: Bus schedules, live GPS tracking, ride share, rentals and ticketing — get around with ease.

market.title: Buy, Sell & Books
market.desc: A student marketplace plus a book hub to buy, sell, rent, swap and donate.

food.title: Food & Meals
food.desc: Campus restaurants, student cloud kitchens and flexible meal subscriptions.

health.title: Health & Emergency
health.desc: Blood donor network, emergency contacts and telemedicine when you need it most.

community.title: Community & Services
community.desc: Clubs, events, jobs, housing, notices and the everyday services students rely on.

faq.a1: We're in the final stretch of development. Join the waitlist and we'll email you the moment we go live.
faq.q2: What can I do on Campus Sheba?
faq.a2: Campus Sheba brings campus life into one app — places, transport, food, marketplace, health, community and more.
faq.a3: Campus Sheba is free to join. Some premium services may have their own pricing, shared transparently at launch.

comingSoon.footer: We're putting the finishing touches on Campus Sheba. Thank you for your patience.

legal.dataNotice: We collect location, student ID, phone, and email to deliver campus services. Your data is used only to power the app and is never sold to third parties.
